title: Le ultime avventure di Galaor
actors: Alfredo Boccolini, Tatiana Gorka, Decio Iacobacci
plot: Back from America, Galaor, actor and adventurer with a big heart, finds Lise, his beloved cousin. The young girl is about to marry, against her will, the banker Moriang, who has won her father's favor by saving his factories from ...
